details: Mattermost Mobile Apps versions <=2.37 11.4 2.0.37 11.0.4 11.1.3 11.3.2 10.11.11.0 fail to properly validate the SSO authentication callback origin which allows an attacker controlling a malicious Mattermost server to steal user credentials for a legitimate Mattermost server via relaying the SSO code exchange flow through the mobile application. Mattermost Advisory ID: MMSA-2025-00564
